## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss content performance and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance: Blog impressions declining due to lack of new articles; podium pages showing upward trend](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Expense category refreshes: Significant increase in impressions and clicks after publishing large volume of pages](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [In-progress tasks: Vendor pages nearing completion, tooling article calibration underway](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Report improvements: Team to add expense category URLs, highlight new high-ranking articles, and enhance filtering options](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Blog performance:](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Impressions and traffic declining](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Attributed to lack of new article publications](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Expected improvement once tuning article is published and more refreshes are done](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Podium pages:](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
      - [Showing upward trend in performance](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
      - [Lower overall traffic compared to other site sections](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
      - [High CPM rates](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
      - [Performing well considering search volumes and potential](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)

### Expense Category Refreshes

  - [Significant increase in impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Large volume of pages published recently](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Team will continue monitoring performance](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Detailed analysis of driving pages to be presented next week](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)

### In-Progress Tasks

  - [Vendor pages:](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Tara incorporating feedback](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
      - [Expected delivery tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [No technical errors anticipated](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Tooling page (calibration article):](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [Questions raised about CTA placement and format](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [Team to work on CTAs one by one](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
      - [Plan to reuse existing product links where applicable](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
      - [Internal review pending, completion expected early next week](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)

### Report Improvements

  - [Expense category URLs to be added as separate section due to high volume](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [New feature: Highlighting new articles performing well in rankings, even without high traffic](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Additional filtering options to be added:](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [By landing page type (e.g., expense category)](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Ability to filter down to specific groups of pages](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Deliver vendor pages tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [Complete tooling article calibration and send for review](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Implement report improvements (expense category section, new article rankings, enhanced filtering)](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Prepare detailed analysis of expense category page performance for next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Continue work on remaining tooling pages](https://fathom.video/share/k4QJBLj9JFdBfZ7x1FFsunb1_uLkp-mU?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
